heading: Applicability of Bretton Woods Agreements Act
label: 283cc Applicability of Bretton Woods Agreements Act
text: The provisions of shall apply with respect to the Corporation to the same extent as with respect to the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the International Monetary Fund.section 286b of this title
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 204 of title II of S. 2416, Ninety-eighth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Mar. 13, 1984Pub. L. 98–473

Amendments1989— struck out at end “Reports with respect to the Corporation under paragraphs (5) and (6) of subsection (b) of shall be included in the first and subsequent reports made thereunder after the United States accepts membership in the Corporation.”Pub. L. 101–240section 286b of this title
